# Session 08: The Grand Capstone - Master Dashboard

We conclude the bootcamp by building a **Master Control Tower** that brings together everything we've built.

## Business Value
In the high-stakes world of AI for Healthcare, a disconnected approach to strategy leads to suboptimal outcomes. To truly thrive, **Healthcare AI Leaders** must harness the power of a unified framework that integrates data quality, model performance, and security checks – think of it as ensuring your clinical decision support system (CDSS) is running smoothly while maintaining HIPAA compliance.
## Lab Objectives
1. Build a Streamlit dashboard.
2. Connect it to the outputs of Session 01 and Session 07.
3. Visualize the end-to-end **AI for Healthcare** AI lifecycle.
